title: mimulus crista-galli
intro: Mimulus crista-galli, also known as the Red Monkey Flower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Mimulus crista-galli include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, and its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Mimulus crista-galli can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
